about

high school student, cs/iot geek. likes to explore stuff.

my current interests are cybersec, edge ai, ml, rl, iot, football and larping.

projects

  • betjee: virtual prediction market
    Feb 2026

    built a virtual prediction market for jee shifts, loved on r/jeeneetards. reached 1.2m requests, 2.3k users — mostly from reddit. documented some dumb decisions that blew past the free tier.

    supabasepostgresqlserverless system design
  • no-cursor
    Jan 2026

    CLI-first code editor with llama.cpp integration for fully local operation.

  • filesense
    Dec 2025

    Local file organizer that groups documents using semantic similarity and user feedback.

    pythonsentence-embeddingsreinforcement-learningfaissSBERT / BERTautomation
  • threads
    Nov 2025

    High-availability Q&A social platform with a 4-layer moderation pipeline. Dockerized Node.js on Google Cloud Run.
